phrases.intent_en: When does the last bus to Prague leave
phrases.text_local: Kdy jede poslední autobus do Prahy?
phrases.cultural_note: Providing both the time and platform is standard, efficient practice for bus station staff.

phrases.intent_en: Where is platform five for regional buses
phrases.text_local: Kde je nástupiště pět pro regionální autobusy?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech bus stations often use numbered platforms (nástupiště). Regional buses may depart from a separate section.

likely_response.local: Rovně, pak doleva na konec haly.
likely_response.translation_en: Straight, then left at the end of the hall.

responses.english: Straight, then left at the end of the hall.
responses.french: Rovně, pak doleva na konec haly.

phrases.intent_en: Is there luggage storage at the station
phrases.cultural_note: A simple 'ano' (yes) with a location is more helpful than a bare confirmation.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, next to the main entrance.

responses.english: Yes, next to the main entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the ticket machine for city buses
phrases.text_local: Kde je automat na jízdenky na městské autobusy?
phrases.cultural_note: City bus tickets are often bought from machines near the connecting tram stop outside the main terminal building.

likely_response.translation_en: By the exit to the tram stop.

responses.english: By the exit to the tram stop.
